source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Template:2026_FIFA_World_Cup_third-place_table (verified raw wiki source; FIFA Regulations May 2026 Annex C at https://digitalhub.fifa.com/m/636f5c9c6f29771f/original/FWC2026_regulations_EN.pdf)
schema_note: Top-level keys are 8-letter alphabetical strings listing which 12 groups (A-L) supplied the 8 qualifying third-placers (e.g. 'ABCDEFGH' = thirds from A,B,C,D,E,F,G,H qualified, thirds from I,J,K,L did not). Each value maps the third-placed team label '3X' to the Round-of-32 match number it is assigned to. R32 match numbers M73-M88 are the 16 R32 fixtures; only 8 of them include a third-placer (M74, M77, M79, M80, M81, M82, M85, M87) - the other 8 are runner-up vs runner-up or winner vs runner-up pairings. The bracket is identical across all 495 scenarios EXCEPT for which third-placed team enters which of the 8 flex slots.
